detection_signals: API, REST, GraphQL, endpoints, microservice, backend, server
key_questions: API versioning strategy? Authentication method? Rate limiting? Documentation format?

detection_signals: web, frontend, SPA, SSR, browser, responsive, dashboard, portal
required_sections: user_flows, ui_components, responsive_design, auth_model, api_contracts, data_model
key_questions: Target browsers? SSR vs SPA? State management? Responsive breakpoints?

detection_signals: iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter, mobile, app store
key_questions: Native vs cross-platform? Offline requirements? Push notifications? App store guidelines?

detection_signals: SaaS, multi-tenant, subscription, billing, organization, workspace
required_sections: tenant_isolation, billing_model, subscription_tiers, sso_integration, admin_panel, data_model
key_questions: Multi-tenancy model? Billing integration? SSO/SAML? Admin capabilities?

detection_signals: CLI, command-line, terminal, flags, arguments, stdin, stdout
key_questions: Distribution method? Shell compatibility? Configuration file format?

detection_signals: desktop, Electron, Tauri, native, Windows, macOS, Linux
key_questions: Target platforms? Distribution method? Auto-update strategy? System integration?

detection_signals: ETL, pipeline, batch, streaming, data warehouse, analytics, ingestion
key_questions: Data volume? Frequency? Source systems? Error recovery strategy?

detection_signals: plugin, extension, add-on, integration, SDK, hook
key_questions: Host platform API? Distribution? Configuration model? Lifecycle hooks?

detection_signals: landing page, portfolio, documentation, brochure, static
key_questions: Content update frequency? SEO requirements? Deployment target?

detection_signals: chat, collaboration, real-time, WebSocket, live, streaming
key_questions: Concurrent users? Message delivery guarantees? Presence detection? Scaling strategy?
